codeReview.summary: The verify-no-regressions feature successfully confirmed all original tests pass and existing functionality is preserved. The final commit e39c597 contains only code quality improvements (refactored if-else to switch, moved testError type definition, changed WriteString(fmt.Sprintf()) to fmt.Fprintf(), simplified boolean comparisons). No behavioral changes or regressions introduced.

summary: Feature verification PASSED. The worker confirmed via make test (0 failures), make lint (0 errors), and go test -race ./... (0 races) that all 42 bug fixes across the verification milestone preserved existing functionality with no regressions. The final commit contains only legitimate code quality improvements: refactored if-else chains to switch statements, moved testError type to fix staticcheck warning, replaced sb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf()) with more efficient fmt.Fprintf(), and simplified boolean comparisons. All changes are style/efficiency improvements with no behavioral modifications.
